title: HEALTHY BIRTH INITIATIVE - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT NORTH EAST HEALTH CENTER AND DENTAL CLINIC HEALTHY BIRTH INITIATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home visits, health education, and support groups from pregnancy through the child's second year. Offers reduced-cost car seats, as well as certified assistance in installation. 5329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Home visiting services: Pregnant African American women who are less than 18 weeks gestation. Those over 18 weeks gestation can still participate in support groups and classes. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm (503) 988-3387 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 988-5558 Main phone (503) 988-5182 FAX Main phone (503) 988-3387 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 6, 72 Services: Child Passenger Safety Seats * African American Community Home Based Parenting Education * African American Community Pregnancy/Childbirth Support Groups * African American Community Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE CLINICS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT NORTH EAST HEALTH CENTER AND DENTAL CLINIC
